# ROTHME

> ROTHME is an AI-powered business growth platform. It brings marketing, analytics, publishing, automation, and reporting into one workspace, with an AI strategist that explains — in plain English — what happened, why, and what to do next.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What ROTHME is and how it works.
- [Why ROTHME](/why): The philosophy behind the product.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing.
- [Get started](/get-started): Onboarding entry point.
- [Design](/design): Design principles and system.

## Optional

- [AI Strategist](/assistant): The plain-English AI marketing strategist.
